'''fongalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:araceous|araceous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:araceous|araceous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fongalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fongalithi|fongalithi]] || [[word:fongaliji|fongaliji]] || [[word:fongalishi|fongalishi]] || [[word:fongaliki|fongaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fongaluthuthu|fongaluthuthu]] || [[word:fongalujuju|fongalujuju]] || [[word:fongalushushu|fongalushushu]] || [[word:fongalukuku|fongalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fongaluthu|fongaluthu]] || [[word:fongaluju|fongaluju]] || [[word:fongalushu|fongalushu]] || [[word:fongaluku|fongaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fongalufthuf|fongalufthuf]] || [[word:fongalufjuf|fongalufjuf]] || [[word:fongalufshuf|fongalufshuf]] || [[word:fongalufkuf|fongalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fongalethe|fongalethe]] || [[word:fongaleje|fongaleje]] || [[word:fongaleshe|fongaleshe]] || [[word:fongaleke|fongaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fongalothotho|fongalothotho]] || [[word:fongalojojo|fongalojojo]] || [[word:fongaloshosho|fongaloshosho]] || [[word:fongalokoko|fongalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fongalotho|fongalotho]] || [[word:fongalojo|fongalojo]] || [[word:fongalosho|fongalosho]] || [[word:fongaloko|fongaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fongalofthof|fongalofthof]] || [[word:fongalofjof|fongalofjof]] || [[word:fongalofshof|fongalofshof]] || [[word:fongalofkof|fongalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fongalïfthïf|fongalïfthïf]] || [[word:fongalïfjïf|fongalïfjïf]] || [[word:fongalïfshïf|fongalïfshïf]] || [[word:fongalïfkïf|fongalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fongalïfthïfthïf|fongalïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:fongalïfjïfjïf|fongalïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:fongalïfshïfshïf|fongalïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:fongalïfkïfkïf|fongalïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fongalïfthïf|fongalïfthïf]] || [[word:fongalïfjïf|fongalïfjïf]] || [[word:fongalïfshïf|fongalïfshïf]] || [[word:fongalïfkïf|fongalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fongalïfthïf|fongalïfthïf]] || [[word:fongalïfjïf|fongalïfjïf]] || [[word:fongalïfshïf|fongalïfshïf]] || [[word:fongalïfkïf|fongalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fongalæthæ|fongalæthæ]] || [[word:fongalæjæ|fongalæjæ]] || [[word:fongalæshæ|fongalæshæ]] || [[word:fongalækæ|fongalækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fongalathatha|fongalathatha]] || [[word:fongalajaja|fongalajaja]] || [[word:fongalashasha|fongalashasha]] || [[word:fongalakaka|fongalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fongalatha|fongalatha]] || [[word:fongalaja|fongalaja]] || [[word:fongalasha|fongalasha]] || [[word:fongalaka|fongalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fongalafthaf|fongalafthaf]] || [[word:fongalafjaf|fongalafjaf]] || [[word:fongalafshaf|fongalafshaf]] || [[word:fongalafkaf|fongalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fongalasha|fongalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fongalshësha|fongalshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fongalrosha|fongalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fongalmusha|fongalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fongalyasha|fongalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofongalnkshësha|gofongalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofongalnkrosha|gofongalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofongalnkmusha|gofongalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofongalnkyasha|gofongalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fongangalasha|fongangalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fongangalshësha|fongangalshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fongangalrosha|fongangalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fongangalmusha|fongangalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fongangalyasha|fongangalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofongangalnkshësha|gofongangalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofongangalnkrosha|gofongangalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofongangalnkmusha|gofongangalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofongangalnkyasha|gofongangalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fengælasha|fengælasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fengælshësha|fengælshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fengælrosha|fengælrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fengælmusha|fengælmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fengælyasha|fengælyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofengælnkshësha|gofengælnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofengælnkrosha|gofengælnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofengælnkmusha|gofengælnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofengælnkyasha|gofengælnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fongfalasha|fongfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fongfalshësha|fongfalshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fongfalrosha|fongfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fongfalmusha|fongfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fongfalyasha|fongfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofongfalnkshësha|gofongfalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofongfalnkrosha|gofongfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofongfalnkmusha|gofongfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofongfalnkyasha|gofongfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
